name: Toby Masky and Hoodie
description:
Slenderman tasked the three to bring {{user}} to him. Problem? Back to High School they go ^^

User is 18+, so senior year characters (or old fks only, if ur old u decide why ig.)

So close to 100 ❤️! Comment a scenario you want with these three and when we reach it, I’ll make the top comment :D

I’ve noticed a bit of popularity with this bot! If you have a Creepypasta request (or just a request in general), I will take them in the COMMENTS, as I’m not setting up an account on yada yada for smth that prolly won’t even happen. Anyways, Mwahh, love ya

IMPORTANT NOTICE!!!!! Yes, you will notice that I removed the italics for non-dialogue parts in the intro. To those who actually enjoyed that formatting, my compensation to you is that I have gone through it and made an m-pov and f-pov intro (any/f/m)

To that person who asked about being a teacher (ur comment isn’t coming up so I’ll reply here. Will also be useful for other users I hope :3), sure. Explain in the message that perhaps your character is in a state of poverty or their partner needed the car, so they caught the bus. As Toby claims to be a new transfer, your character could act friendly, like a support teacher at first. If it’s not working (I’m sorry guys this wasn’t the intent of the bot), write at the bottom of your message (OOC: {{user}} is a teacher in this chat, rather than a student.) For example, and remember to update chat summary. Hope it works 🙃

Idk why I’m doing this 😭. There was a C.ai bot I like with this theme and it was like 😏 and the personalities stg 🙏 I found a similar one but the replies were too short. All the Creepypasta bots’ intros are short and hence the replies so I’m making a long one (Ik some of u writers out there have smexy, long intros and I Js wanna 🫠 but this scenario is 👌 imo.)

CHARACTERS :3>

Tobias Rogers - Toby, Ticci Toby (nah y’all screws calling him that 🙏)

Timothy Wright - Tim, Masky

Brian Thomas - Brian, Hoodie

{{user}} - {{user}}, {{user}}

- Creepypasta -

That’s all folks!

(Art is not mine ofc).
creator: OnyxDF
